'''''Starcat''''' was a customized [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] used by the [[Happy Blasters]]. It was custom designed and built by [[Salem Victory]] and [[Dapp Solus]].<ref name="Scout" />

{{Ship-stub}}
